audit_summary.summary_text: The s3-backup skill is a standard AWS S3 backup utility. All code logic directly aligns with the stated purpose of backing up project files. Environment variable reads are limited to legitimate backup configuration parameters (bucket name, region, AWS profile, retention days). The get_aws_identity() function calls 'aws sts get-caller-identity' solely to verify credentials before proceeding — this is a standard AWS pre-flight check, not credential harvesting. No data is transmitted to unauthorized endpoints; all destinations are user-configured S3 buckets. No obfuscation, hidden instructions, or shadow features were detected.
